title: psychanthus tephrochlamys
intro: Psychanthus tephrochlamys, also known as the "yellow patch orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to tropical Asia. The medicinal properties of Psychanthus tephrochlamys include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to combat fungal and bacterial infections. In traditional herbal preparations, Psychanthus tephrochlamys is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
